appraisal_events.evidence: Swann ... avait pris dans le milieu Guermantes l'habitude de recevoir les grands artistes comme de bons amis...
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Swann as socially at ease and habituated to entertaining great artists in the Guermantes milieu, which locally frames him as a figure of high social standing and cultural familiarity.

status_effects.explanation: Swann is locally elevated by being depicted as an assured host within an elite milieu who treats great artists as familiar friends.
